item.description: ### Fixed - **No more phantom "NEEDS YOU" during agent fan-outs.** When a Claude session runs background agents (planning, parallel exploration), an agent's own permission prompt could leave the session stuck showing "NEEDS YOU / Approve: …" for many minutes after the prompt was already resolved — with nothing to approve at the terminal. Perch now checks whether the session is *actually* waiting on a prompt and clears the false alarm within seconds. Real prompts still show for exactly as long as they're on screen.
